curation_notes: Patch commit fixes four GHSAs simultaneously across 4 non-test source files (SandboxExec.ts, executor.ts, parser.ts, utils.ts), making it noisy. Primary locations derived from the patch diff: assignCheck in executor.ts contained a bypassable prototype override check (used obj.context.hasOwnProperty which could be manipulated, and failed to block overwriting own properties on safe prototypes), and Scope.get in utils.ts had a variable scoping bug where let declarations resolved prototype access incorrectly. No sibling files — each src/ file has a distinct role. Vulnerability class kept as command-injection per CWE-94 (Code Injection); the PoC demonstrates full RCE via sandbox escape to child_process.execSync.
